raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 538 aims to improve the availability, efficiency, and quality of medical evidentiary examinations for sexual assault survivors.",
    "Timely access to trauma-informed, evidence-based care can prevent adverse health outcomes for sexual assault survivors.",
    "The collection of evidence during medical evidentiary examinations is integral to law enforcement's ability to apprehend offenders.",
    "According to a National Intimate Partner and Sexual Violence Survey, one in three women and one in six men in the United States have experienced sexual violence.",
    "Many survivors choose to have invasive and lengthy medical evidentiary examinations performed after experiencing sexual violence.",
    "Timely access to medical evidentiary examinations is critical due to evidence degradation.",
    "Access to qualified healthcare providers that conduct medical evidentiary examinations is limited across the United States."
  ]
}
```
